name: kye-protocol
description: Skills exposing KYE Protocol — Know Your Entity — actions to AI agents.

skills.name: kye-register-entity
skills.description: Register a new entity (human, business, ai_agent, service, model, tool, workflow) and obtain its URN.

skills.name: kye-create-delegation
skills.description: Create a delegation from a delegator to an actor for a subject, scoped to allowed_actions.

skills.name: kye-authorize
skills.description: Ask the PDP whether actor may take action. Returns a signed PolicyDecision with reason codes and obligations.

skills.name: kye-invoke-capability
skills.description: Invoke a registered capability (skill / tool / mcp_tool / function / connector / playbook). Gated by capability grants.

skills.name: kye-point-in-time-audit
skills.description: Replay the audit chain up to a sequence or timestamp; returns counts and entity_last_event snapshot.

skills.name: kye-request-recovery
skills.description: Open a recovery request; signed proof on decide.

skills.name: kye-report-compromise
skills.description: File a compromise report; cascade revocation across delegations, payment authorities, access rights, capability grants.

skills.name: kye-rotate-keys
skills.description: Rotate Gateway signing keys. Requires a valid X-Break-Glass-Grant-Id header.
